By forcing a vote on the women's reservation bill, linked to delimitation, the BJP aimed to record every MP's stance, creating a potent campaign tool. The government positioned itself as pro-women reformists, while blaming opposition parties for obstructing progress. This tactic seeks to shape the political narrative ahead of crucial elections, highlighting intent versus obstruction.

What is so special about Iran’s uranium that US, China & Russia all want it?
description: Iran's enriched uranium stockpile has become a focal point in a global power contest, with the US, China, and Russia vying for influence. Tehran insists the material will not be handed over, despite US claims of an impending agreement for its recovery. This dispute highlights the complex political and strategic stakes surrounding Iran's nuclear program.

description: A bizarre selection mix-up in the Pakistan Super League saw a replacement player feature alongside the one he was meant to replace. ‘Anti-Al’ attacker who tried to murder Sam Altman found ChatGPT ‘awesome’
description: Accused Molotov cocktail thrower Daniel Moreno-Gama, once a ChatGPT fan for 'cheating,' turned AI 'hater' after reading critics like Eliezer Yudkowsky. He joined peaceful activism groups like PauseAI, warning of extinction. Despite expressing fears of violence online, he was told to exhaust peaceful means first, ironically in a podcast interview.

'Bhooth Bangla' opens to strong Rs 23 crore worldwide debut; ends 'Dhurandhar 2' reign
description: Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla' has stormed the box office, securing a massive Rs 23.90 crore worldwide debut on its opening day. This impressive performance has dethroned Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' after its four-week reign. The horror-comedy's strong opening positions it among Akshay Kumar's top post-pandemic releases.

American Express executive found dead in Gurgaon; wife finds body inside flat
description: A 33-year-old American Express executive was found dead by suicide in his Gurgaon flat on Friday. His wife, who flew in from Mumbai after he stopped answering calls following a fight, discovered the scene. The couple, married four months ago, faced marital strain due to their differing work locations. Police are investigating the incident, noting the deceased was under stress.

Ali Asgar on drag typecasting: Comic says kids were bullied over ‘Dadi’
description: Iconic actor Ali Asgar, best known for his beloved 'Dadi' character, opened up about the emotional impact his drag performances had on his family. He shared that his children endured bullying at school because of his female roles, prompting him to turn down similar opportunities.

title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
description: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.
